sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106236" key="u(groqhrikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-θηρική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">water-hunting,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fishing,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
